bead.title: registry: resolve global plugin tier and enforce project-over-global lookup precedence
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a; foundational layer for sibling install/init/update beads)

Runtime plugin/skill/persona lookup assumes per-project installs only. There is no resolver for the global tier and no defined precedence when a plugin exists in more than one tier. Sibling beads adding `ddx install --global`, `ddx init --global`, and `ddx update --global` all depend on this resolution layer existing first.

ROOT CAUSE
- Lookup resolves only ddxroot.Path()/plugins/<name> (in-tree: <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>; convention: ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<host>/<owner>/<repo>/plugins/<name>). There is no ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name> resolver in the registry package, and no precedence chain combining project, global, and baked-in tiers.

PROPOSED FIX
1. Add a GlobalPluginDir(name) resolver returning ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/, routed through the ddx-home resolution agreed in ddx-06cbaa90 (do not hardcode ~/.local/share — honor XDG_DATA_HOME override).
2. Implement the runtime lookup precedence used by every plugin/skill/persona consumer:
   a. project tier — ddxroot.Path()/plugins/<name>/ (in-tree <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/ or the convention-mode XDG project dir) if present;
   b. global tier — ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/ otherwise;
   c. baked-in binary fallback — only for the default `ddx` plugin.
3. Expose the resolved tier (project|global|baked-in) so `ddx doctor` (sibling bead) can report which tier answered.

NON-SCOPE
- Adding the `--global` CLI flags themselves (sibling install/init/update beads).
- Removing the existing per-project install (both modes coexist).
- Migrating any legacy ~/.config/ddx paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution): the global tier path and the project tier path both route through ddxroot.Path() and the new ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/ root; both must be agreed before this lands.

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- Epic ddx-602ae31a, Principle 2.
- CLAUDE.md "Persona System" three-layer precedence note (project → global → baked-in) — this bead implements it in code; the documentation edit is owned by the sibling spec bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestPluginLookup_PrefersProjectOverGlobal asserts that when the same plugin exists in both the project tier (ddxroot.Path()/plugins/<name>) and the global tier (${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>), the resolver returns the project copy.
2. TestPluginLookup_FallsBackToGlobal asserts that when the project copy is absent but the global copy exists, the resolver returns the global copy; and that for the default `ddx` plugin with neither present, the baked-in fallback is returned.
3. TestGlobalPluginDir_HonorsXDGDataHome asserts GlobalPluginDir resolves under ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name> and respects an overridden XDG_DATA_HOME env var rather than a hardcoded home path.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/registry/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
